name: Feedback Collection
description: Slash command that collects feedback via dialog, posts to channel, and DMs confirmation

input.description: Submit feedback with rating and comments
input.parameters:
[
  {
    "name": "rating",
    "label": "Rating",
    "hint": "Rate from 1 (poor) to 5 (excellent)",
    "optional": true,
    "control_type": "select",
    "pick_list": [
      [
        "1 - Poor",
        "1"
      ],
      [

      ],
      [
        "5 - Excellent",
        "5"
      ]
    ],
    "type": "array",
    "prompt": "true",

    "options": "1 - Poor,2 - Fair,3 - Good,4 - Very Good,5 - Excellent",
    "properties": [

    ]
  },
  {
    "name": "category",
    "label": "Category",
    "hint": "Select feedback category",
    "optional": true,
    "control_type": "select",
    "pick_list": [
      [

      ],

        "support"

    "options": "Product,Support,Documentation,Other",
    "properties": [

    ]
  },
  {
    "name": "comments",
    "label": "Comments",
    "hint": "Provide detailed feedback",
    "optional": "false",
    "control_type": "text-area"

]

properties.label: Rating
